runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th over 460m at this track beaten 10 lengths (26.32) behind Not Again in a Restricted WIN H on April 10. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (27.83) over 485m at Horsham. Drawn close to the inside. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: At the last outing finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Tick Returns beaten 4 lengths (22.58). Can make amends. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last outing finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Tick Returns beaten 4 lengths (22.58). Can make amends. Worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.
Raced wide in home straight; Marred approaching winning post.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 2 lengths at Warrnambool (25.90) beating Dance Lady Dance in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 6. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at The Meadows (30.52) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.4 lengths third. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Can feature in the finish.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by 6 lengths at The Meadows over 525m (30.08) beating Amron Tommy in Grade 5 on April 1. Key chance on that latest effort.
